instruction:
Given the curve $L: y=\frac{4} {9} x^{2} \left(x \geqslant0 \right)$, point
$O \left(0, 0 \right)$, point $A \left(0, 1 \right)$Let $P$ be the moving point on $L$, $S$ is the area of the graph enclosed by the straight line $O A$, the straight line $A P$ and the curve $L$. If $P$ moves to the point $(3, 4)$ along the axis of $x$, the rate of change of $S$ with respect to time $t$ is ().

Options:
A. $9$
B. $14$
C. $13$
D. $12$
E. $8$
F. $10$
G. $15$
H. $11$
I. $7$
J. $6$
